languages.text: "Лишь сильный достоин того, чтобы выжить, прочие же — расходный материал. Он не испугался смерти, а значит он сильный".
"Only the strong are worthy of surviving, the rest are expendable. He did not fear death, so he is strong.
languages.original_text: "Лишь сильный достоин того, чтобы выжить, прочие же — расходный материал. Он не испугался смерти, а значит он сильный".

traits.locale_text: "Only the strong are worthy of surviving, the rest are expendable. He did not fear death, so he is strong.
"Only the strong are worthy of surviving, the rest are expendable. He did not fear death, so he is strong.
"Only the strong are worthy of surviving, the rest are expendable. He did not fear death, so he is strong.

languages.text: 「生き残る資格があるのは強い者だけだ。残りは消耗品だ。死を恐れない者は強い」
languages.original_text: "Only the strong are worthy of surviving, the rest are expendable. He did not fear death, so he is strong.

traits.locale_text: 「生き残る資格があるのは強い者だけだ。残りは消耗品だ。死を恐れない者は強い。」

languages.text: “只有强者才配生存，其余皆可牺牲。他不惧死亡，所以他是强者。”
languages.original_text: "Only the strong are worthy of surviving, the rest are expendable. He did not fear death, so he is strong.

traits.locale_text: “只有强者才配生存，其余皆可牺牲。他不惧死亡，所以他是强者。”

languages.text: «Solo los fuertes merecen sobrevivir; el resto son prescindibles. No ha temido a la muerte, y, por lo tanto, es fuerte».
languages.original_text: "Only the strong are worthy of surviving, the rest are expendable. He did not fear death, so he is strong.

traits.locale_text: «Solo los fuertes merecen sobrevivir; el resto son prescindibles. No ha temido a la muerte, y, por lo tanto, es fuerte».

languages.text: "Nur die Starken verdienen es, zu überleben. Der Rest ist ersetzbar. Er hat den Tod nicht gefürchtet, also ist er stark."
languages.original_text: "Only the strong are worthy of surviving, the rest are expendable. He did not fear death, so he is strong.

traits.locale_text: "Nur die Starken verdienen es, zu überleben. Der Rest ist ersetzbar. Er hat den Tod nicht gefürchtet, also ist er stark."

languages.text: « Seuls les forts sont dignes de survivre, les autres sont remplaçables. Cet homme a montré sa force en affrontant la mort sans crainte. »
languages.original_text: "Only the strong are worthy of surviving, the rest are expendable. He did not fear death, so he is strong.

traits.locale_text: « Seuls les forts sont dignes de survivre, les autres sont remplaçables. Cet homme a montré sa force en affrontant la mort sans crainte. »

languages.text: "Sadece güçlü olanlar hayatta kalmaya layıktır, geri kalanı gözden çıkarılabilir. Ölümden korkmamış, demek ki güçlü."
languages.original_text: "Only the strong are worthy of surviving, the rest are expendable. He did not fear death, so he is strong.

traits.locale_text: "Sadece güçlü olanlar hayatta kalmaya layıktır, geri kalanı gözden çıkarılabilir. Ölümden korkmamış, demek ki güçlü."
